import { Component, OnInit } from '@angular/core'; import { ActivatedRoute } from '@angular/router'; import { ResumeResponse } from '../../../core/models/resume.model'; import { ResumeService } from '../../../core/services/resume.service'; @Component({ selector: 'app-resume-detail', templateUrl: './resume-detail.component.html' }) export class ResumeDetailComponent implements OnInit { resume: ResumeResponse | null = null; loading = true; constructor( private readonly route: ActivatedRoute, private readonly resumeService: ResumeService ) { } ngOnInit(): void { const resumeId = Number(this.route.snapshot.paramMap.get('id')); this.resumeService.getResume(resumeId).subscribe({ next: (resume) => { this.resume = resume; this.loading = false; }, error: () => { this.loading = false; } }); } }
